cases.prompt: 이번 작업 보고서 작성해줘. html 보고서로.

assertions.text: Produces a single self-contained HTML at .simonk/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.html with inline CSS and no external deps
Covers executive summary, decisions log, phase trace, diff summary, verification, and next-up backlog
Sends the file proactively via SendUserFile so the user receives it on mobile
Renders the simonk-session-specific fixed schema (phase-by-phase trace, diffs, verifications)
Accumulates the report under .simonk/reports/ as a sprint log
